arts.ttl: Birmingham City dealt new injury blow as Davies gives Buchanan, Wright and Hansson latest
arts.sum: “Unfortunately Sampsted has picked up a bit of a knock on his ankle,” Blues manager Chris Davies confirmed before the team’s trip to Shrewsbury Town on Saturday. Alfons Sampsted has become the latest Birmingham City player to return from international duty with an injury.

arts.ttl: Preview: Shrewsbury Town vs. Birmingham City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Shrewsbury Town and Birmingham City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Shrewsbury Town appoint new physical performance coach
arts.sum: Wates, who worked with Salop's manager Gareth Ainsworth and his assistant Richard Dobson at Wycombe and Queens Park Rangers, has been added to the staff at their Sundorne Castle training base. Wates first worked with Dobson in 2007 when Ainsworth was a player at Wycombe and he has explained what he will add to Salop.
